pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent from 3.0.0 to 4.0.1, which requires Java 21.
Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc to adapt to Spring Boot 4.0 changes.
Replace spring-boot-starter-test with spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test to adapt to Spring Boot 4.0 changes.
Add thymeleaf-layout-dialect dependency to support layout features in Thymeleaf templates.
Add htmx-spring-boot-thymeleaf dependency to integrate HTMX with Spring Boot and Thymeleaf.
Add webjars-locator-lite to enable automatic path resolution for WebJars assets.
Add Bootstrap WebJar dependency for frontend styling.
Add Font Awesome WebJar dependency for icons.
Add Popper.js WebJar dependency for Bootstrap tooltips and popovers.
Add HTMX WebJar dependency for dynamic HTML interactions.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor to generate metadata for externalized configuration.
Add spring-boot-docker-compose dependency to support Docker Compose integration.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Remove Lombok dependency and its exclusion from the build plugin.
Remove Testcontainers dependencies and BOM management.
Add JReleaser Maven plugin for automated release and deployment to Maven Central.
Add a Maven profile for generating source and javadoc jars during release.
Add project URL, inception year, license, developer, and SCM information to pom.xml.
Update the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 0.4.1-SNAPSHOT.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to exclude application class and SQL files from the main jar.

.github/dependabot.yml.general_idea: Enable Dependabot to automatically update GitHub Actions versions in the workflow files.
.github/dependabot.yml.human_impl: Added a new update block with package-ecosystem: 'github-actions' and daily schedule.
